name: Killer Pancakes
recipeIngredient: maple syrup OR chopped fresh strawberries macerated with a little sugar
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Spray two nonstick cookie sheets with vegetable oil and set aside.
Sift dry ingredients together and set aside. Beat the egg whites until frothy. Add the reserved fruit cocktail juice. Gradually add the dry mixture, stirring until well blended. Fold in the fruit.
Using a 2 tbsp measure, scoop dollops of pancake batter onto the sprayed pans, leaving at least 2 inches between pancakes. Bake for 10-15 minutes or until puffed and golden. Serve hot with maple syrup or fresh strawberries, peaches, or other fruit. 2 tbsp measure = coffee scoop.
